arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou rails against ‘offensive’ criticism of Spurs tenure
arts.sum: Manager says his accent leads to ‘dismissive’ coverage Australian says Emery and Nuno had similar treatment Ange Postecoglou has said some of the criticism he receives is offensive, personal and disrespectful. The Tottenham manager, whose attack-minded tactics have been questioned – most recently after Thursday’s 4-3 Carabao Cup quarter-final win over Manchester United – wonders whether this is influenced by his Australian accent or the disdain he shows for established practices. Postecoglou said he saw the same thing happen to Unai Emery at Arsenal and Nuno Espírito Santo when the Portuguese was in charge of Spurs. Emery, now at Aston Villa, was ridiculed at times for his difficulties with English pronunciation. Nuno is doing well at Nottingham Forest after an unhappy 17-game spell at Spurs in 2021. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: I hope Postecoglou wins trophy with Spurs - Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot says he hopes Tottenham counterpart Ange Postecoglu wins a trophy as reward for his attacking brand of football.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot breaks his silence on Tottenham links and makes Ange Postecoglou claim
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot was heavily linked with a move to Tottenham but was happy he stayed at Feyenoord ahead of his switch to Liverpool to replace Jurgen Klopp last summer

arts.ttl: Arne Slot says one of his Liverpool stars in contract stand-off has 'room for improvement'
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has hailed England full-back Trent Alexander-Arnold as 'incredible' but still wants to see more consistency from the right-back, who is out of contract in the summer

arts.ttl: I didn’t want to be 70 saying I could have signed Archie Gray – Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: Spurs opted to sign the teenager from Leeds in a player-plus-cash deal which could rise to £40million rather than a ready-made first-teamer.

arts.ttl: Tottenham’s sliding doors moment which saw them miss out on control and embrace chaos
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou arrived in June 2023 but beforehand the north London club identified Slot as a key target

arts.ttl: Slot: It's a joy to watch Spurs
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has lauded the attacking football implemented by Tottenham Hotspur under Ange Postecoglou, expressing his hope that the Australian's bold approach will ultimately be rewarded with a major trophy. Speaking ahead of Sunday's Premier League meeting between the sides, Slot said: "For me, his brand of football is more important.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou reveals Tottenham planning shift in transfer philosophy to strengthen squad
arts.sum: Spurs set to make shift towards more experienced players in upcoming windows

arts.ttl: 'Why not?': Tottenham move for £50m Premier League star talked up, pundit hopes for January transfer
arts.sum: Tottenham were keen back in 2022 as well...

arts.ttl: Everton get the keys to stunning new stadium as club takes over Liverpool's Fourth Grace
arts.sum: The club was handed control of the waterfront site during a ceremony on Friday
